stays with
you.

Sunflora makes heirloom-feel crochet pieces — sun-bright amigurumi, blooming florals, and custom characters. Every stitch is slow on purpose.

Watch how a piece
comes to life

Why Sunflora

Not a product.
A keepsake.

Everything we make is hooked by a single pair of hands, over hours — sometimes days. No machines. No shortcuts. Just slow, sun-soaked craft.

Each piece is named and numbered — never duplicated
Wrapped in kraft paper, sealed with our sun stamp
A handwritten care card with every order
Custom commissions from your memories, photos, or ideas
Start your order

Custom Orders

By request · any idea

Quote on inquiry

800+ happy homes

★★★★★

"I ordered a custom piece of my late dog and I ugly-cried when I opened it. It was perfect."

Rhea S. · Custom Amigurumi

★★★★★

"The packaging alone made me emotional. Felt like I was opening a gift from a dear friend."

Mira T. · Sunshine Keychain

★★★★★

"She brings the sun indoors. I have four Sunflora pieces and every guest notices them first."

Anika D. · Returning customer

Process

How your piece is born.

01

You dream it

Send us a photo, a memory, a moodboard — even a doodle. We'll listen.

02

We sketch it

We choose yarns together and share a sketch for your approval before we begin.

03

We hook it

Your piece is crocheted by hand — slowly — over 5 to 14 days.

04

You keep it

Wrapped in kraft and twine, with a handwritten note. Straight to your door.

Pricing

Pick your piece.

Ready-made or fully custom — there's something here for every budget and every story.

Ready-made
₹249+

Pieces in stock, ready to ship within 3–5 days. Perfect for gifts that can't wait.

  • Keychains, mini amigurumi & florals
  • Ships in 3–5 working days
  • Kraft paper packaging included
  • Handwritten care card
Shop ready-made
Most popular
Custom Order
₹549+

Your idea, our hands. Send us anything — a photo, a pet, a memory — and we'll make it real.

  • Any character, colour, or size
  • Yarn swatch photo for approval
  • 5–14 day crafting window
  • Named & numbered certificate
  • Full gift packaging with extras
Start a custom
Gift Bundle
₹899+

A curated set of 2–3 pieces — ideal for birthdays, anniversaries, or new babies.

  • 2–3 coordinated pieces
  • Premium gift box with ribbon
  • Custom message card
  • Free dried marigold garnish
Build a bundle

One last thing

Let's craft
your story.

Whether it's a gift, a heirloom, or simply something to keep on your desk — we'd love to make it for you.

WhatsApp us @sunflora.craft
